data_in.description: Spectral library or molecular feature metadata

data_out.description: Chemical Feature Tree artifact (Newick format or QIIME 2 Phylogeny object)

domain_knowledge: Chemical Feature Trees enable chemically-informed hierarchical clustering of mass-spectrometry features by integrating spectral similarity and molecular mass information.
q2-qemistree operates within the QIIME 2 framework, requiring input data in standardized artifact (.qza) format with proper feature identifiers.
The resulting tree represents chemical relationships among detected metabolomic features and supports downstream comparative analysis across sample cohorts.

direct_checks: verify q2-qemistree plugin is installable from github:biocore__q2-qemistree
verify q2-qemistree accepts LC-MS/MS feature data in QIIME 2 artifact format (e.g., FeatureTable[Frequency])
verify q2-qemistree produces a tree artifact output (Phylogeny[Rooted] or equivalent format)
script_runs: q2-qemistree command executes without error on valid input feature table and molecular networking data
verify output tree file exists and is in valid Newick or compatible phylogenetic format
verify tree contains nodes corresponding to input LC-MS/MS features — row_count_equals or node count matches feature count (robust to tree representation choices)
expert_review: assess whether tree topology reflects expected chemical relatedness among metabolomic features (requires domain knowledge of mass-spectrometry feature clustering)
evaluate whether branching patterns are biologically/chemically interpretable for untargeted metabolomic comparison
review whether feature tree enables meaningful downstream statistical or visual analysis as intended by tool design

Invoke q2-qemistree to construct a phylogenetic-style tree integrating spectral similarity and molecular mass relationships
Export the Chemical Feature Tree as a Newick-format phylogeny for downstream metabolomic comparison

task_description: Invoke the q2-qemistree QIIME 2 plugin to construct a Chemical Feature Tree from LC-MS/MS feature data, producing a phylogenetic-style tree artifact that enables chemically-informed comparison of untargeted metabolomic profiles.

task_inputs.label: LC-MS/MS feature table in QIIME 2 format

task_objective: Implement the q2-qemistree QIIME 2 plugin to construct a Chemical Feature Tree artifact from LC-MS/MS metabolomic feature data.
title: Reconstruct the LC-MS/MS feature tree construction pipeline in q2-qemistree

workflow_description: 1. Load LC-MS/MS feature table and spectral library data into QIIME 2 artifact format (.qza). 2. Invoke q2-qemistree plugin to build the Chemical Feature Tree using spectral similarity and molecular mass relationships. 3. Export the resulting tree artifact (.qza) in Newick format or as a QIIME 2-compatible phylogenetic tree object.
